name: MediaApiStandalone
description: Layers the cross-origin configuration needed to run the Media gallery SPA as a standalone external app (hosted on its own origin) on top of the MediaApiPkce recipe. Apply MediaApiPkce FIRST (it enables the OpenID Server/Validation/Management and bearer Media API); then this recipe (1) enables the OrchardCore.Cors module and configures a default CORS policy allowing the app origin for the Media API, /connect/token and /hubs/media (bearer-only, so AllowCredentials is false), and (2) re-declares the 'media_gallery' public client with the app-origin callback + silent-renew redirect URIs added. IMPORTANT: replace https://media.example.com with the standalone app's real origin (scheme+host+port, no trailing slash for CORS origins), and https://localhost:5001 with the Orchard tenant origin. The redirect URIs must exactly match the pages the app serves (callback.html / silent-callback.html at the app origin+base). CORS origins are ORIGINS ONLY — no path, no trailing slash.
author: The Orchard Core Team
